ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Append file explorer items in active tab group
ast.target: 在活动标签组中追加文件资源管理器项目

ast.target: 用文件资源管理器项目替换活动标签组

ast.source: Open file explorer items in new split up
ast.target: 在新上方拆分中打开文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Open file explorer items in new split down
ast.target: 在新下方拆分中打开文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Compact Mode: Append file explorer items in left split
ast.target: 紧凑模式：在左侧拆分中追加文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Compact Mode: Replace left split with file explorer items
ast.target: 紧凑模式：用文件资源管理器项目替换左侧拆分

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Semi-compact Mode: Append file explorer items in left split
ast.target: 半紧凑模式：在左侧拆分中追加文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Semi-compact Mode: Replace left split with file explorer items
ast.target: 半紧凑模式：用文件资源管理器项目替换左侧拆分

ast.name: alert
ast.source:
Continuous Mode:
Please select a single click action in the settings.
ast.target: 连续模式：\n请在设置中选择一个单击操作。

ast.name: alert
ast.source:
Continuous Mode:
No file explorer item selected
ast.target: 连续模式：\n未选择文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: alert
ast.source:
Continuous Mode:
Active tab group is not in continuous mode.
ast.target: 连续模式：\n活动标签组未处于连续模式。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Please enter a positive integer, 0, or leave blank.
ast.target: 请输入正整数、0 或留空。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source:
Continuous Mode:
You are about to replace all items currently open in the active split.
						
Are you sure you want to do this?

(This warning can be disabled in the settings.)
ast.target:
连续模式：
您即将替换活动拆分中当前打开的所有项目。

确定要执行此操作吗？

（此警告可在设置中禁用。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The settings in this section allow you to choose which items are opened in Continuous Mode when clicking File Explorer items, or using the commands and contextual menus. (Note: toggling off these settings does not prevent any of the deselected file types from being opened manually.)
ast.target: 本节中的设置允许您选择在连续模式下点击文件资源管理器项目或使用命令和上下文菜单时打开哪些项目。（注意：关闭这些设置不会阻止手动打开任何未选中的文件类型。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Natively supported file types: avif, bmp, gif, jpg, png, svg, webp.
ast.target: 原生支持的文件类型：avif, bmp, gif, jpg, png, svg, webp。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Natively supported file types: aac, aif, aiff, ape, flac, m4a, mka, mp3, ogg, opus, wav, m4v, mkv, mov, mp4, mpeg, webm.
ast.target: 原生支持的文件类型：aac, aif, aiff, ape, flac, m4a, mka, mp3, ogg, opus, wav, m4v, mkv, mov, mp4, mpeg, webm。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you have installed plugins that allow Obsidian to support file types or extensions not included above, add the file extensions here, comma-separated.
ast.target: 如果您安装了允许 Obsidian 支持上述未包含的文件类型或扩展名的插件，请在此处添加文件扩展名，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files by name and/or extension. Comma-separated, case-sensitive, partial name and Regex allowed. (Note: If the file name contains commas, use periods [wildcard character] instead.) Extensions added here will override the settings in the above categories.
ast.target: 按名称和/或扩展名排除文件。用逗号分隔，区分大小写，允许部分名称和正则表达式。（注意：如果文件名包含逗号，请使用句点 [通配符] 代替。）此处添加的扩展名将覆盖上述类别中的设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, include embedded files when opening all document links in Continuous Mode.
ast.target: 如果为 true，在连续模式下打开所有文档链接时包含嵌入文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, include links in Dataview and Query blocks when opening all document links in Continuous Mode. Whether true or false, links from individual blocks can still be opened directly from the block menu.
ast.target: 如果为 true，在连续模式下打开所有文档链接时包含 Dataview 和 Query 块中的链接。无论设置如何，仍可直接从块菜单打开单个块中的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The settings in this section provide options for opening items in Continuous Mode (e.g., single/multiple files or folders in the File Explorer).
ast.target: 本节中的设置提供了在连续模式下打开项目的选项（例如，文件资源管理器中的单个/多个文件或文件夹）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this setting to make it possible to open items from the File Explorer with a single click. Set the default single click action below.
ast.target: 启用此设置以允许通过单击打开文件资源管理器中的项目。在下方设置默认单击操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Warn when replacing active tab group items with new items.
ast.target: 当用新项目替换活动标签组项目时发出警告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the directory contains an “index.md” file or a file with the same name as the directory itself, it will be moved to the top of the opened files, regardless of the sort order.
ast.target: 如果目录包含“index.md”文件或与目录本身同名的文件，无论排序顺序如何，它都将被移至已打开文件的顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide various elements of the workspace UI to enhance the “continuous” experience.
ast.target: 隐藏工作区 UI 的各种元素，以增强“连续”体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the row of tabs at the top of the split. Provides a bit more vertical space and reduces visual clutter, especially with many tabs open.
ast.target: 隐藏拆分顶部的标签行。提供更多垂直空间并减少视觉杂乱，尤其是在打开多个标签时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the note headers when opening items in Continuous Mode.
ast.target: 在连续模式下打开项目时隐藏笔记标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable auto-scrolling of leaves, tab headers, etc. into view when clicked, when typing in the active editor, or when using the arrow keys.
ast.target: 启用叶子、标签标题等的自动滚动到视图中，当点击时、在活动编辑器中输入时或使用方向键时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only available when scroll-into-view is enabled.
ast.target: 仅在启用滚动到视图时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keeps the active paragraph in the center of the screen. Only available when scroll-into-view is enabled.
ast.target: 将活动段落保持在屏幕中央。仅在启用滚动到视图时可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: From the first or last line of the active editor, use the arrow up/down keys to open the previous or next file (as listed in the File Explorer) in the same tab instead of moving into the previous or next tab.
ast.target: 从活动编辑器的第一行或最后一行，使用向上/向下方向键在同一标签中打开上一个或下一个文件（如文件资源管理器中所列），而不是移动到上一个或下一个标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this plugin, please consider donating to support continued development.
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件，请考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include all Dataview and Query block links
ast.target: 包含所有 Dataview 和 Query 块链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 2. 在连续模式下打开项目

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow single click to open File Explorer items in Continuous Mode
ast.target: 允许单击在连续模式下打开文件资源管理器项目

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum number of items to open at one time
ast.target: 一次打开的最大项目数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only show file name in note headers
ast.target: 仅在笔记标题中显示文件名

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 例如 html, js, py 等。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 使用文件资源管理器顺序

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by file name (A to Z)
ast.target: 按文件名排序 (A 到 Z)

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by file name (Z to A)
ast.target: 按文件名排序 (Z 到 A)

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by modified time (new to old)
ast.target: 按修改时间排序（从新到旧）

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by modified time (old to new)
ast.target: 按修改时间排序（从旧到新）

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by created time (new to old)
ast.target: 按创建时间排序（从新到旧）

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Sort by created time (old to new)
ast.target: 按创建时间排序（从旧到新）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle hide tab bar in active tab group
ast.target: 切换在活动标签组中隐藏标签栏
